title: catalog audit cannot resolve captionless figures from MinerU image blocks
evidence: saleh_teich_photonics smoke remains critical after 3 audit iterations: H6 unresolved Figure refs=8 and H7 empty_captions=170. Many figure blocks have no adjacent caption text in content_list.json, so schema-only regex/figure_caption_merge cannot recover semantic ids or captions.
proposal: Extend catalog/build pipeline to support per-book figure exclusion/override maps or OCR-side caption attachment for captionless image blocks, so audit-book can mark unresolved decorative/non-captioned images without modifying parser.py.
